title: Deepfake election integrity
description: Synthetic video and audio spread faster than fact-checking; platforms lack consistent detection at upload.

title: LLM training data consent
description: Copyright and opt-out regimes for web-scraped training data are unsettled; creators see uncompensated use.

title: Child safety online
description: End-to-end encryption complicates abuse detection; global legal standards differ sharply.

title: Algorithmic hiring bias
description: Resume screening tools may encode historical bias; audits are not mandatory in many jurisdictions.

title: IoT botnet scale
description: Cheap cameras and routers ship with default passwords; botnets fuel DDoS at terabit scale.

title: Cross-border data localization
description: Conflicting sovereignty rules force duplicate infrastructure and raise costs for global SaaS.

title: Disinformation in crisis messaging
description: Emergency alerts and maps are spoofed during disasters; public trust in official channels erodes.

title: AI-generated code vulnerabilities
description: Developers paste Copilot-style snippets without review; dependency confusion and insecure patterns propagate.

title: Digital identity for refugees
description: Paper credentials are lost in displacement; blockchain-based ID pilots lack interoperability.

title: Ransomware and critical infrastructure
description: Hospitals and water utilities pay ransoms; backups and segmentation are inconsistently funded.

title: Platform moderation at scale
description: Human reviewers face trauma; automated rules miss context in minority languages.

title: Smart city sensor privacy
description: Cameras and Wi-Fi probes enable services but residents fear surveillance without clear governance.

title: Open-source supply chain attacks
description: Maintainer burnout and typosquat packages allow compromise of widely used libraries.

title: Accessibility in AI interfaces
description: Voice-first and multimodal UIs often skip screen reader testing; disabled users are excluded.

title: Quantum threat to cryptography
description: Long-lived secrets must migrate to post-quantum algorithms; hardware and protocol upgrades lag.
